preferences.particleTraceDescription: Show the path traveled by the particle.

info.title: Game Information
info.introduction: Drive the red particle to the finish tile. Choose Position, Velocity, or Acceleration and use the control pad, drag the particle, or the arrow keys / WASD. Reach the goal with zero wall collisions to win.
info.practiceDescription: Practice: Open arena with no walls. Learn the controls.
info.level1Description: Level 1: A simple maze with a few walls.
info.level2Description: Level 2: A winding maze bounded by outer walls.
info.certainDeathDescription: Certain Death: A challenging maze. Good luck!

keyboardHelp.controlParticleDescription: Arrow keys or W, A, S, D. In Position mode, moves the particle. In Velocity mode, sets velocity. In Acceleration mode, sets acceleration.
keyboardHelp.stopMotionDescription: In Velocity or Acceleration mode, sets velocity or acceleration to zero.

a11y.controlPadHelpPosition: Drag the knob or use arrow keys to set particle position.
a11y.controlPadHelpVelocity: Drag the knob or use arrow keys to set velocity. Press Space to stop.
a11y.controlPadHelpAcceleration: Drag the knob or use arrow keys to set acceleration. Press Space to stop.
a11y.particleHelpPosition: Position mode. Drag to move or use arrow keys.
a11y.particleHelpVelocity: Velocity mode. Use the control pad or arrow keys to set velocity.
a11y.particleHelpAcceleration: Acceleration mode. Use the control pad or arrow keys to set acceleration.
a11y.levelSelectorHelp: Choose a maze level. Resets the current game.
a11y.velocityModeHelp: Sets particle velocity. Press Space to stop motion.
a11y.accelerationModeHelp: Sets particle acceleration. Press Space to stop motion.

screenSummary.playArea: Drive the red particle through the maze to the finish tile. Reach the goal with zero wall collisions to win.
screenSummary.controlArea: Choose Position, Velocity, or Acceleration. Use the control pad, drag the particle, or arrow keys. Pick a level and track elapsed time and collisions.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Arrow keys or W, A, S, D control the particle. Space stops motion in Velocity or Acceleration mode.
